subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto whoso desireth to drink from the Kawthar of life in the days of the All-Merciful, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان فی ایام الرحمن لیفرح بذکر مولی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment
